For example, 2, 3, 5, 7.", "tts_engine": "android", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 2500}, {"frame_type": "concept", "text": "**Composite Numbers**", "speech": "Composite numbers ante prime numbers ni multiply chesi form chesina numbers. 140 is a composite number.", "tts_engine": "gemini", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 2000}, {"frame_type": "concept", "text": "**Why factorize?**", "speech": "Mari ee composite numbers ni prime factors ga ela break cheyalo chuddama?", "tts_engine": "gemini", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 1500}]}, {"title": "Starting Factor Tree", "lang": "te-IN", "image_description": "factor tree diagram", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.85, "frames": [{"frame_type": "concept", "text": "**Factor Tree Method**", "speech": "Factor tree method use chesi 140 ni divide cheddam. So, 140 divided by 2 is 70.", "tts_engine": "gemini", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 2000, "diagram_data": {"intent": "Show 140 branching into 2 and 70"}, "highlight": [], "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": [], "svg_html": "<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,user-scalable=no"><style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#1A2B1A;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%;height:100vh}svg{max-width:100%}</style></head><body><svg viewBox="0 0 400 300" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="400" height="300" fill="#1A2B1A"/>
  <text x="200" y="30" font-family="serif" fill="#F0EDD0" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0"><animate attributeName="opacity" values="0;1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="0s"/>Starting Factor Tree</text>
  
  <circle cx="200" cy="80" r="25" fill="#4FC3F7" fill-opacity="0.25" stroke="#4FC3F7" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="157" stroke-dashoffset="157">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="157;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="0.3s"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="200" y="85" font-family="serif" fill="#F0EDD0" font-size="13" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0"><animate attributeName="opacity" values="0;1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="0.3s"/>140</text>

  <path d="M 180 100 L 140 160" stroke="#8BAB8B" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="72" stroke-dashoffset="72">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="72;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="0.9s"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M 220 100 L 260 160" stroke="#8BAB8B" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="72" stroke-dashoffset="72">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="72;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="1.5s"/>
  </path>

  <circle cx="140" cy="185" r="20" fill="#FF6B6B" fill-opacity="0.25" stroke="#FF6B6B" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="126" stroke-dashoffset="126">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="126;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="1.5s"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="140" y="190" font-family="serif" fill="#F0EDD0" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0"><animate attributeName="opacity" values="0;1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="1.5s"/>2</text>

  <circle cx="260" cy="185" r="20" fill="#81C784" fill-opacity="0.25" stroke="#81C784" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="126" stroke-dashoffset="126">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="126;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="2.1s"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="260" y="190" font-family="serif" fill="#F0EDD0" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0"><animate attributeName="opacity" values="0;1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="2.1s"/>70</text>

  <text x="200" y="250" font-family="serif" fill="#F0EDD0" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0"><animate attributeName="opacity" values="0;1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="2.4s"/>140 ÷ 2 = 70</text>

Tree ippudu 2, 2, and 35 ga vundi.", "tts_engine": "gemini", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 2000, "diagram_data": {"intent": "Show 70 branching into 2 and 35"}, "highlight": [], "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": [], "svg_html": "<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,user-scalable=no"><style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#1A2B1A;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%;height:100vh}svg{max-width:100%}</style></head><body><svg viewBox="0 0 400 300" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="400" height="300" fill="#1A2B1A"/>
  
  <text x="200" y="30" font-family="serif" fill="#F0EDD0" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0;1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="0s"/>
    Dividing Further
  </text>

  <g stroke="#F0EDD0" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
    <path d="M200 60 L140 120" stroke-dasharray="85" stroke-dashoffset="85">
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="85;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="0.3s"/>
    </path>
    <path d="M200 60 L260 120" stroke-dasharray="85" stroke-dashoffset="85">
      <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="85;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="0.9s"/>
    </path>
  </g>

  <circle cx="200" cy="60" r="20" fill="#4FC3F7" fill-opacity="0.25" stroke="#4FC3F7" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="126" stroke-dashoffset="126">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="126;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="0.3s"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="200" y="65" font-family="serif" fill="#F0EDD0" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0;1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="0.3s"/>
    70
  </text>

  <circle cx="140" cy="120" r="20" fill="#81C784" fill-opacity="0.25" stroke="#81C784" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="126" stroke-dashoffset="126">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="126;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="0.9s"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="140" y="125" font-family="serif" fill="#F0EDD0" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0;1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="0.9s"/>
    2
  </text>

  <circle cx="260" cy="120" r="20" fill="#FFB74D" fill-opacity="0.25" stroke="#FFB74D" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="126" stroke-dashoffset="126">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="126;0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="1.5s"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="260" y="125" font-family="serif" fill="#F0EDD0" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0;1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="1.5s"/>
    35
  </text>

  <text x="200" y="250" font-family="serif" fill="#F0EDD0" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" values="0;1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="1.8s"/>
    70 = 2 × 35
  </text>
</svg></body></html>"}, {"frame_type": "concept", "text": "**What about 35?**", "speech": "35 ni 2 or 3 tho divide cheyalem.
